Apples mixed with cinnamon and sugar

questions.q: In the Northern Hemisphere's autumnal equinox, which celestial event causes day and night to be approximately equal in length?
choices: The moon's orbital plane aligns with Earth's equator
The sun crosses the celestial equator moving southward
Solar radiation intensity peaks at the equator
The Earth's axial tilt reaches maximum inclination toward the sun

questions.q: Which 12th-century Romance language literary tradition first documented the etymological root of the English word 'autumn'?
choices: Old French verse and chronicled texts

questions.q: Paul Verlaine's 'Chanson d'automne' employs which structural device to mirror the melancholic emptiness of autumn?
choices: Extended metaphor comparing leaves to lost love
Personification of the season as a dying entity
Alexandrine couplets with alternating rhyme schemes
Repetition and sparse, echoing verses creating semantic void

questions.q: The ancient Celtic festival of Samhain, celebrated around November 1st, was believed by practitioners to occur when which boundary became permeable?
choices: The lunar cycle completing its final waning phase
The barrier between the living and the deceased
The territorial borders between Celtic clans

questions.q: Which Jewish autumn holiday requires the construction of a temporary dwelling and commemorates which historical event?
choices: Yom Kippur; the sealing of divine judgment
Tu B'Shevat; the new year for trees
Shavuot; the revelation at Mount Sinai
Sukkot; the exodus from Egypt and wilderness wandering

questions.q: In John Keats' 'To Autumn,' the speaker addresses autumn as a figure doing which primary action in the opening stanza?
choices: Preparing the ground for winter's sleep
Harvesting and ripening the earth's bounty
Lamenting the departure of summer's warmth
Painting the landscape with chromatic decline

questions.q: The Mid-Autumn Festival, celebrated across East Asia, traditionally honors which celestial body's symbolic connection to family reunion?
choices: The full moon in its autumn position
Jupiter during its autumn visibility window

questions.q: In medieval Northern English dialect, the term 'backend' was used to reference which season?
choices: The latter part of the harvest year

questions.q: The term 'autumnus' in classical Latin literature derives from which root, relating to agricultural cycles?
choices: Augere, meaning to increase or grow
Augustus, the name of the Roman emperor
Autere, meaning to withdraw or diminish

questions.q: The Christian observance of All Saints' Day on November 1st originated from which religious tradition's attempt at cultural conversion?
choices: Early Christian efforts to replace the pagan festival of Samhain
The Jewish calendar's influence on Christian dating

questions.q: In the Southern Hemisphere, autumn typically occurs between which pair of months?

choices: Increased tannin concentration in leaf tissues
Production of anthocyanins as chlorophyll breaks down
Degradation of chlorophyll revealing underlying carotenoids

questions.q: In traditional East Asian calendar systems, autumn officially concludes around which date in the Northern Hemisphere?

choices: Celebrating the canonization of new saints
Honoring the apostles' migration to distant lands
Interceding for the souls of the deceased in purgatory

questions.q: On which date is Halloween observed?

source.notes: Runs March-May in Australia, New Zealand, and southern South America.

source.notes: New England and eastern Canada are top destinations.

source.notes: Shortest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere.
